instructions: draft is a task runner where each tool runs a named task that may compose others in series and parallel call the welcome task for a syntax cheat sheet or read the draft guide resource for the full guide

tools.name: welcome
tools.description: use when someone wants to see how draft works

resources.name: draft-guide
resources.description: read when you need to write or run tasks with draft

resources.name: draft-mcp-guide
resources.description: read when you need to expose task files over MCP

resources.name: draft-keycloak-guide
resources.description: read when you need to set up keycloak auth for the mcp server
